case_title: TERRENCE JACKSON VS. CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO

docket_entries.description: DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) CHRISTINE ECHAVIA, CCSF INVESTIGATOR FILED BY DEFENDANT CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO

REQUEST TO WAIVE COURT FEES AND COSTS PURSUANT TO G.C. 68633, CRC 3.51, 8.26, AND 8.818 (CONFIDENTIAL) FILED BY PLAINTIFF JACKSON, TERRENCE ORDER FOR WAIVER OF COURT FEES AND COSTS GRANTED PURSUANT TO G.C. 68634 (E), CRC 3.52
AUTO ACCIDENT CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $6,500.00 FILED BY JACKSON, TERRENCE AS TO DEFENDANT CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JAN-24-2020 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF JACKSON, TERRENCE RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO $1,500.00 PRINCIPAL, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,500.00, SEE ATTACHED STATEMENT OF DECISION STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS PLAINTIFF'S AND DEFENDANT'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED
EXHIBITS FROM EXHIBIT REPORT DATED MAY-01-2020 ORDERED DESTROYED

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF JAN-24-2020 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF JAN-24-2020 BY A. JAMES ROBERTSON II. PLAINTIFF TERRENCE JACKSON IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT CCSF, REPRESENTED BY CHRISTINE ECHAVIA, CCSF INVESTIGATOR IS PRESENT. PLAINTIFF AND DEFENDANT EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE A. JAMES ROBERTSON II; CLERK: W. TRUPEK. NOT REPORTED.(506)
REMARK: RETURNED MAIL: NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT MAILED TO DEFENDANT ON 02/03/20. PER U.S. POSTAL SERVICE, "RETURN TO SENDER - INSUFFICIENT ADDRESS - UNABLE TO FORWARD."
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FEE: $0.00 WAIVER SERVED DEC-16-2019, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JAN-24-2020 - JUDGMENT.
